notes:
New Features

• Added Inventory Generator
• Generate QBCore shared/items.lua entries
• Generate OX Inventory weapon entries
• Generate ESX Config.Weapons entries
• Generate ESX SQL item entries
• Generate AddTextEntry and weapon testing snippets
• Supports single weapon folders and full weapon packs
• One-click code copying to clipboard
• Automatic weapon scanning from weapons.meta
• Automatic inventory image detection
• Automatic weapon label detection from AddTextEntry entries

Improvements

• Improved weapon metadata scanning
• Improved inventory generation accuracy
• Improved framework compatibility
• Cleaner generated weapon labels
• Improved folder and pack detection
• Enhanced code generation workflow

Fixes

• Fixed weapon detection edge cases
• Fixed malformed weapons.meta parsing issues
• Fixed inventory image handling when no PNG exists
• Fixed label generation producing incorrect weapon names
• Fixed framework generation inconsistencies
• General bug fixes and stability improvements
